query_topic: housing costs for international students NYC

persona.audience: International students aged 18-30 living in NYC

results.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
results.content_chunk: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges. The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.
